name: Suvidhaa Infoserve Limited
summary: Suvidhaa Infoserve Limited offers payment services. The company provides its payment services for domestic remittance, individual and business loans, mutual fund and other investment products, ATM, utility bill payments, recharges, travel ticketing, general and life insurance, E-Commerce, bank account opening, pre-paid/gift card issuance, and cash collection and bank account deposit services through S-Commerce Platform. It serves customers through Suvidhaa Centres, a financial services hub; Suvidhaa Points; and sPAY, a POS based transaction acquiring platform. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Mumbai, India.
